list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat(libpartition_map)!: Add support for reading super metadata with liblp
- This commit only includes the necessary changes to the library.

project.component: { "keyToString": { "ASKED_MARK_IGNORED_FILES_AS_EXCLUDED": "true", "C/C++ File.main.cpp.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.CLI11-generate-single-file.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.docs.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.libhelper_shared.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.RadMigrateCodeStyle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "RunOnceActivity.west.config.association.type.startup.service": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "SHELLCHECK.PATH": "I do mind", "Shell Script.Build (Debug).executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Build (Debug, only-builtins).executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Build.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Cleanup generated docs.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Cleanup.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Open Shell.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Push To Device.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Reformat And Push Code.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Reformat Code.executor": "Run", "bazel.project.detector.is.bazel.project": "true", "cf.advertisement.text.overridden": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "deletionFromPopupRequiresConfirmation": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "last_opened_file_path": "/home/yzbruh/IdeaProjects/pmt-renovated/external/patches/libbase", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "org.rust.cargo.project.model.PROJECT_DISCOVERY": "true", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "project.propVCSSupport.DirectoryMappings", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: adb shell; adb shell su -c rm -f /data/local/tmp/pmt_static exit $?

option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: build/scripts/reformat.sh && git add . && git commit -m "pmt: reformat code" && proxychains git push

task.summary: Default task
plugins: update BackupPlugin, FlashPlugin and ErasePlugin - Add buffer size limits, etc.
plugins: simplify the structure
plugins: update plugin examples.

docs(documentation-mainpage,CONTRUBUTING): update maninpage of wiki and create contributing guide
- Contributing document should have been included much earlier. Even though it's late, adding it was necessary.
docs(README): fixup format, etc.

refactor(CommandLine): CLI11 usage has been discontinued.
- Cleaned from CMake scripts and git modules.

refactor(CommandLine,libhelper)!: Switch to the built-in, dedicated command-line handler.
- For greater control, a dedicated command-line handler, libhelper!a, has been added in place of CLI11. - All necessary code integration has been completed. - It's not as good as CLI11, but at least it allows me to have much better control.

feat(CMDLine,Plugins): Add collections of checkers and callbacks.
- Apply to plugins.
fix(CMDLine): fixup CMDLine collections.
refactor(Out): Move Out namespace to libhelper

refactor(libbase)!: Disable libbase (for now)
- Use __system_property_read_callback instead of android::base::getProperty
refactor(android): Fixup soong files
refactor(crypto): Use libcrypto instead of picosha2.
refactor(PartitionMananger): Use checker collection of libhelper.
feat(CMDLine): Add new checkers to checker collection.
docs(PluginInstructures): Update plugin examples.
feat(CMake): Add LTO-Thin support
refactor(libcrypto): Also included is static compilation to ensure compatibility up to Android 5.

fix(CMake)!: Fix common errors in the code.
- Remove libbase includes. - Add boringssl includes (publicly)
refactor(MemoryTestPlugin,libhelper)!: Also included is static compilation to ensure compatibility up to Android 5.
fix(libpartition_map): Automatically identify sector sizes used on older devices to ensure compatibility up to Android 5.
refactor(boringssl): Use main-kernel branch instead of main
refactor(boringssl): Merge 7c758f7b0cc0ce62397c2567fd1e6908fb964a9b
refactor(build.sh): Set default ANDROID_PLATFORM to android-22 (android 5 support)
refactor(build.yml): Upgrade to NDK r29, create more streamlined release bodies with conventional commits.
fix(build.yml): Add missing package(s), etc.
refactor(build.yml): Use softprops/action-gh-release@v2 to create releases.
fix(CMake): Set CMP0053 policy.
docs(doxygen): Describe a problem that might occur in recovery mode, and use references.
docs(doxygen): fixup syntax
docs(doxygen): fixup lining
docs(doxygen): Use code blocks instead of code lines
fix(Partition_t): Fixup move = assignment
fix(ErasePlugin): Start threads after creating.
fix(CMDLine): Fixup default value handling with transformer.

feat(libpartition_map): Start working on 1.8.0
- Add new magics to definations, etc.
refactor(scripts): Improve build.sh and manager.sh
refactor(scripts): Improve build.sh.
chore(CMake)!: Set minimum required CMake version to 3.40
docs(doxygen): Fixup missinformations.
chore(clang-format,scripts): Fixup .clang-format settings, etc.
docs(AdvancedExamplePlugin): Fixup wrong library usage.
perf(libhelper): Reduce the Helper::Silencer class size from 12 bytes to 6 bytes.
docs(libhelper): Add cmdline.hpp documentation.
refactor(libhelper)!: Improve Silencer class.
refactor(libhelper)!: Improve Silencer class.
fix(libbase)!: Some patches have been made for compatibility with lower Android API's

feat(libpartition_map)!: Add support for reading super metadata with liblp
- This commit only includes the necessary changes to the library.

MESSAGE.value: refactor(build.yml): Upgrade to NDK r29, create more streamlined release bodies with conventional commits.
fix(build.yml): Add missing package(s), etc.
refactor(build.yml): Use softprops/action-gh-release@v2 to create releases.
fix(CMake): Set CMP0053 policy.
docs(doxygen): Describe a problem that might occur in recovery mode, and use references.
docs(doxygen): fixup syntax
docs(doxygen): fixup lining
docs(doxygen): Use code blocks instead of code lines
fix(Partition_t): Fixup move = assignment
fix(ErasePlugin): Start threads after creating.
fix(CMDLine): Fixup default value handling with transformer.

feat(libpartition_map): Start working on 1.8.0
- Add new magics to definations, etc.
refactor(scripts): Improve build.sh and manager.sh
refactor(scripts): Improve build.sh.
chore(CMake)!: Set minimum required CMake version to 3.40
docs(doxygen): Fixup missinformations.
chore(clang-format,scripts): Fixup .clang-format settings, etc.
docs(AdvancedExamplePlugin): Fixup wrong library usage.
perf(libhelper): Reduce the Helper::Silencer class size from 12 bytes to 6 bytes.
docs(libhelper): Add cmdline.hpp documentation.
refactor(libpartition_map)!: Apply changes of Silencer class.
refactor(libpartition_map)!: Apply changes of Silencer class.
fix(libbase)!: Some patches have been made for compatibility with lower Android API's

feat(libpartition_map)!: Add support for reading super metadata with liblp
- This commit only includes the necessary changes to the library.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat(libpartition_map)!: Add support for reading super metadata with liblp
- This commit only includes the necessary changes to the library.
